textByHash.c49bb015e9151d3d6775b3d7b24018d43a0adaa1: Well then, what do we have here?
textByHash.b2b397deb277bf91d34e29e9cd446b48b71ed4e1: Seems I came at just the right time.
textByHash.23a6e361a2208aff46de1b8d69635913ba07d1b9: We'd better get you out of here before that thing returns.
textByHash.f4ac92fef66dc35c26ce4d1ec5622452be1541e3: My name's Spria and I'm a slayer master. You've had a nasty encounter with a Sourhog.
textByHash.2035d71c7fcb8d01c799b3bea364e2973044144e: Precisely. You're extremely lucky that I found you. Another few hours and you'd have been hog chow.
textByHash.348c91d7305ad29547e99310bc1e0587eefa9352: Were you responding to Sarah's bounty too?
textByHash.5a86318de0653a284d77b360c3deb98362e41687: I thought as much. I found you on the floor of the cave, you must have been knocked unconscious.
textByHash.09df295ac03a322f0a53a3ddee4ad2efc66797d4: I have an item for you that will help you on your quest, but you don't seem to have enough space. Come and see me again when you've cleared some room.
textByHash.9c6c5b4b7711783de204f94deddde4dc77f12e0f: The beast's saliva is extremely acidic and your eyes are most vulnerable. It'll cause terrible injuries and leave you unable to attack or defend yourself very well.
textByHash.07e5f36560492fc7a77048465854700b1f5e8d6d: Luckily, the Slayer skill provides us with an array of useful equipment and techniques for dealing with... special foes.
textByHash.5e6257d958f9a5e256e7f0590cb1a3dcb738a62e: In the case of our Sourhog, you'll be needing these.
textByHash.d83d1175134c9b5786a69eadf857bbdc149ca47c: This eyewear will protect you from the spitting attack, allowing you to fight the monster on equal terms.
textByHash.b6559309613f9427eec67b3e08edea7f8a1e3dcd: Most enemies have a weakness, too. The Sourhog's thick hide provides excellent protection against slashing and insulates it from magic damage.
textByHash.43c4e5e0463cb98233f3dbe6aa6cb3cf37cfe2f8: You'd be best trying to pierce it with arrows or a stabbing weapon.
textByHash.d24d7b40c3af9319ebb2541106c67b60055cd35e: Go now, the bounty is all yours to claim. I suggest you recoup your strength and head back to fight it using your new goggles.
textByHash.5eb225c292b310de32a94197c12eecbfd04b1194: If you make it out alive, collect your bounty and then come see me so that we can speak further.
textByHash.7903300066c90834b07c2453e3e718fd7203466e: Well, I suppose I could have left you in there to be eaten...
textByHash.e52bf17c3a06ebb10f835adae19115a59cd4a94d: But you know what that'd make me? A monster. And as a slayer master, that's really not a great look.
textByHash.5a1b4bd961d3a7053916c800c6270d81a6bcb628: Besides, my father always taught me that knowledge is worth more than gold. I'm happy to sacrifice a few coins in order to pass my experience on to you.
textByHash.90a38bcc82f689246b2f59c4a909fd50f7ccc044: Don't mention it. Was there something else?
textByHash.a912e3df72d78083e3b0db989096ee8d947a1d49: I carried you out and dragged you back here to my house to recover, it really wasn't easy. You're welcome to rest here for as long as you need.
textByHash.bf632fea9d10bf78d9cdc7b738412d8c62e0b85c: There are many of us. We're experts in the ancient art of monster slaying. People from across Gielinor come to us for tasks and advice.
textByHash.d708d590221cc965446131947a775b0ba599d643: Well... actually, I'm fairly new to this. I've been learning from my father, Turael, for many years. We decided it was finally time for me to continue the family profession.
textByHash.57bb6b7fefe4cb4bed68c736c99ad87a00d0081c: No, you're still wearing the last pair I gave you!
textByHash.b58fa1151dc1dacefbb0083ec99f1e754814b9fc: You've still got the last one I gave you, it's there in your inventory! Those things aren't cheap, you know.
textByHash.6999fc47fbdde081fff7e540d2c8338ca82a3c11: I know many people all across Gielinor, and my sources tell me you still have the last one in your bank.
textByHash.50cdfbf6f021a6777a9dfbcd8763b12d7b5443e7: Sure, I have another going spare. Please try to take better care of these.
textByHash.8f86e6186c3ac1417445d6438e0f87687d00745c: Well, I'm not much of a history buff... But I'll tell you what I know.
textByHash.83248797885365518b28c3f8a6e2d3eedc1d1726: Many years back, before even I was around, there were two rival family farms not far from where we're standing.
textByHash.16d6859df9155a80cbab49c404c63eb931141f90: Every year the village would hold a 'Finest Swine in Show' prize at the annual faire.
textByHash.a4247efb50ace7bb50c8ddc5e87f072c306d3393: The same farmer would win year after year without fail. Driven mad with jealousy, his rival decided to hire a dodgy dark wizard to give him an edge over the competition.
textByHash.77dca8aecc217fb24b76e708dd9904b37d65cc2f: The wizard attempted to alter the pig's appearance. I'm sure you can guess how well that went!
textByHash.d777188d7c241de17ec42ca87e5b08a80741c93e: Long story short, the mutant, what we now know as a Sourhog, went on a brief rampage and escaped.
textByHash.d2f7c8113f7f0b378128f1f3f80d0ee3c3a37ad5: It must have somehow managed to reproduce, because people have reported seeing them in groups.
textByHash.3739894cb40263dd4de3fb4772a4f0d0c1960a98: Up until now, so long as they were left alone, they'd keep to themselves. Rumors are, they live in deep underground caverns, scavenging what they can find.
textByHash.b038c0a89f569e4b0825fd3841b185a542840a37: But if they're living so close-by and attacking people on roads, then... they must be getting bold and trying to resurface.
textByHash.cabca66fc19b69d9e2e3e48cd847e6189df49eea: 'Ello, and what are you after then?
textByHash.94ad20e85d7b17af22bdf3bca1e7bcfc67cb9598: Nicely done. Did you collect your reward from Sarah?
textByHash.2054da99a7e7309f65aac881dfaf040eee7ad564: Go and collect your reward and then come and speak with me.
textByHash.6ca619e5ab438f7c65f59a00d2f2001926f80acd: Very impressive, slayer. I'm glad that the goggles served you well.
textByHash.a6e7d4f675576cb118b825d786a574631dad225b: Although, these Sourhogs often live in primitive tribes. I fear that where there's one, there's likely to be more to follow.
textByHash.54ff04ec6f5a65b652acfc38287cf4228b8ec21f: We may have to monitor that lair from time to time to keep their population in check.
textByHash.8f5bfc9623cac06c7399a65fd936930bbe148964: I've noticed that you've unlocked the ability to craft slayer helms. From now on, when assembling one, fasten a pair of Reinforced Goggles to the eye holes to gain their benefit.
textByHash.9dcc3818370fc259736b5881dfbb65b6b5264b39: While we're on the topic, I can upgrade any of your existing slayer helms now.
textByHash.5a4875155a56d58cb338fb20ae2ad2ed6c3e77b3: By the way, you seem to have a natural talent for killing monsters. Would you like a new slayer task now?
textByHash.a1d81bb81b377d8506f172dbea5be0bf83e12269: Very well, come back if you change your mind.
textByHash.2ebcc346dc19b37949f30af03a9d67be8b001d67: It's nothing personal, but I'd prefer not to discuss what happened with my father.
textByHash.0a61552ffbcf756f7cabe30709cb7e6babb5f35c: I've only recently moved in and I'm still getting unpacked. Could you come back later?
textByHash.92d59ac4eef31440349fb8f920c4883b18239b84: You're actually very strong, are you sure you don't want Chaeldar in Zanaris to assign you a task?
textByHash.7b172d997a7cfbf48b6c2eb5c2e7d4f760a1fcc5: Excellent, you're doing great. Your new task is to kill .
textByHash.f5cd0c62021730cfddb9dd2aa04cc62aa1c75f98: You're still hunting , you have to go.
textByHash.e81f713b73d0c12d2f9cefbb81e6b44f1367b13d: You're still hunting , with to go.
textByHash.2d898591aa17e44eb9f3da32c2911ab6fe5031e0: I don't think that's a suitable task for you. Shall I cancel it? This will not wipe your task streaks.
textByHash.4690813fc8fa29e4a7a15380409b6987d0454188: Alright, consider the task cancelled. You can now get a new assignment when you want one.
textByHash.3936915ec951a366ea891abbd6196e29203cad0a: I have quite a few rewards you can earn, and a wide variety of Slayer equipment for sale.
textByHash.c0dcd9325e7ced3243a9d9d8c6771fbe5de4c8db: The Slayer Masters may currently assign you any task in our lists, regardless of your combat level.
textByHash.1cd9bdb2d0b412718114a85d06ea7585b9c1aee5: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.
textByHash.0e0b6ccc4a67de673135b9a90e4e5b040b7f149c: The Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.
textByHash.47f277169b556d3646c41d8aa3ba877ceee4adb1: Okay, we'll keep checking your combat level.
textByHash.dbd53e5f1c3835c46583db9ab8096068eaee8d1f: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will assign you anything from their lists, regardless of your combat level.
